title: Tetraena waterlotii

intro: Tetraena waterlotii, also known as Didiemia waterlotii, is a medicinal plant species native to West Africa, belonging to the family Cactaceae. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems, with reported health benefits including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiparasitic properties.
